hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); cd "C:/Users/Gabriel/Downloads/Frostapp-main/Frostapp-main" && { git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1 || git init; } && { git config user.email > /dev/null 2>&1 || git config user.email "frostapp@local"; } && { git config user.name > /dev/null 2>&1 || git config user.name "FrostApp"; } && FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4) && BASENAME=$(basename "${FILE:-arquivo}") && git add -A && { git diff --cached --quiet || { git commit -m "update: $BASENAME" && git push origin main; }; } 2>/dev/null || true
